name: Bushel of Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Mix in maple syrup.
4. Stir in milk and vanilla extract.
5. Combine oats, raisins, pecans, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; stir into the oat mixture.
6. Fold in butterscotch chips.
7. Cover and chill for 2 hours.
8. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough about 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes.
